summary: BOM Module (Bill of Materials) testing complete. Backend: 28 tests passed, 1 skipped. Fixed critical bug in duplicar_bom endpoint (unique constraint violation). Frontend UI verified with all BOM features accessible.

minor.issue: Some inventario_nombre fields return null for old BOM lines where the referenced inventario_id no longer exists in prod_inventario table (migrated/orphan data)

passed_tests: GET /api/bom?modelo_id={id} - returns list of BOM cabeceras with version, estado, total_lineas
GET /api/bom?modelo_id={id}&estado=BORRADOR - filters by estado
POST /api/bom - creates new BOM cabecera with auto-incremented version
POST /api/bom with invalid modelo_id - returns 404
GET /api/bom/{bom_id} - returns cabecera with lineas array including inventario_nombre, tipo_componente, merma_pct, cantidad_total
PUT /api/bom/{bom_id} estado=APROBADO - changes estado BORRADOR->APROBADO
PUT /api/bom/{bom_id} estado=INACTIVO - changes estado APROBADO->INACTIVO
PUT /api/bom/{bom_id} invalid estado - returns 400
POST /api/bom/{bom_id}/lineas tipo_componente=TELA - creates line with correct cantidad_total calculation
POST /api/bom/{bom_id}/lineas tipo_componente=AVIO - creates line correctly
POST /api/bom/{bom_id}/lineas cantidad_base=0 - returns 400 validation error
POST /api/bom/{bom_id}/lineas merma_pct=150 - returns 400 validation error (must be 0-100)
POST /api/bom/{bom_id}/lineas invalid tipo_componente - returns 400
PUT /api/bom/{bom_id}/lineas/{linea_id} - updates line and recalculates cantidad_total
DELETE /api/bom/{bom_id}/lineas/{linea_id} - deletes line
GET /api/bom/{bom_id}/costo-estandar?cantidad_prendas=100 - returns costo_estandar_unitario, costo_estandar_lote, costo_por_tipo, detalle
Costo estándar detalle includes all required fields (linea_id, inventario_nombre, tipo_componente, cantidad_total, precio_unitario, costo_por_prenda)
Costo estándar calculation: costo_lote = costo_unitario * cantidad_prendas
Costo estándar excludes optional items from total
POST /api/bom/{bom_id}/duplicar - creates new version with copied active lines
POST /api/bom/{bom_id}/duplicar invalid bom_id - returns 404
cantidad_total = cantidad_base * (1 + merma_pct/100) verified with multiple test cases
GET /api/reportes/wip - non-regression: still returns correct WIP data
GET /api/reportes/mp-valorizado - non-regression: still returns correct MP data
GET /api/reportes/pt-valorizado - non-regression: still returns correct PT data
GET /api/reportes/resumen-general - non-regression: still returns correct summary
GET /api/etapas?empresa_id=7 - returns etapas for BOM line assignments
Frontend: BOM/Receta tab accessible from Editar Modelo dialog
Frontend: Version selector dropdown with all BOM versions
Frontend: Estado badge (Borrador/Aprobado/Inactivo) displayed
Frontend: Nuevo BOM, Duplicar buttons present
Frontend: Aprobar/Inactivar/Reactivar buttons based on estado
Frontend: BOM table shows Tipo, Item, Talla, Etapa, Cant. Base, Merma %, Cant. Total, Opc. columns
Frontend: Add component buttons (Tela, Avío, Servicio, Empaque, Otro)
Frontend: Costo estándar display with S/ format
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed unique constraint uq_bom_linea_activo to include bom_id, allowing multiple BOM versions to have same inventario items
Old constraint prevented duplicar_bom from working correctly
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Changed unique index from (modelo_id, inventario_id, talla_id) to (bom_id, inventario_id, COALESCE(talla_id, '__NULL__'))
/app/backend/tests/test_bom_cabecera.py - Created comprehensive test suite for BOM cabecera + lineas
seed_data_creation: Multiple test BOMs created and marked as INACTIVO during cleanup. BOM-EDUARD-V1 retained with 10 lines for future testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BOM Module fully functional. New table prod_bom_cabecera stores BOM headers with version/estado. Table prod_modelo_bom_linea extended with bom_id, tipo_componente, merma_pct, cantidad_total, es_opcional, etapa_id. Unique constraint changed to allow same items across different BOM versions. BOM-EDUARD-V1 (db92cc93-d42e-4038-abe6-f2e18ac4e68e) has 10 lines with data. Some old inventario items referenced in BOM lines no longer exist (show null inventario_nombre).

bom_cabecera_api.detail: GET /api/bom/{bom_id} includes lineas with all fields
bom_cabecera_api.duplicar: POST /api/bom/{bom_id}/duplicar creates new version with copied lines

costo_estandar_api.response: Returns costo_estandar_unitario, costo_estandar_lote, costo_por_tipo breakdown, detalle with per-item costs

frontend_ui.bom_tab: BOM / Receta tab in Editar Modelo dialog
frontend_ui.lineas_table: Tipo, Item, Talla, Etapa, Cant. Base, Merma %, Cant. Total, Opc.

bug_fixed.issue: POST /api/bom/{bom_id}/duplicar returned 500 error - UniqueViolationError on uq_bom_linea_activo
bug_fixed.root_cause: Old unique index was (modelo_id, inventario_id, talla_id) WHERE activo=TRUE, preventing duplicate lines across different BOM versions for same modelo
bug_fixed.fix: Changed unique index to (bom_id, inventario_id, COALESCE(talla_id, '__NULL__')) WHERE activo=TRUE
